name: ADSP Form Service Integration
summary: Embed an ADSP form with live definition loading, validation, and submission.

properties.mode: 'mock' for prototyping without backend, 'live' for real submissions
properties.formServiceBaseUrl: Base URL of Form Service API (required for live mode)
properties.definitionId: Form definition ID from Form Service (required for live mode)
properties.accessToken: Bearer token for authenticated requests (required for live mode)

mockModeNotes: Mock mode allows rapid prototyping without Form Service setup
Define inline schemas to test form layouts
Switch to live mode when ready to connect to real backend
liveModeNotes: Form definition must exist in Form Service
Submissions are persisted and can trigger workflows
